race.comment: ZOCKETMAN (6) talented colt who won at his first two starts in good order on the country and provincial tracks. Sent to town and bled in both nostrils when seventh over 1200m at Rosehill in BM68 class last November. Returns with the two good trials and the tongue-tie goes on. Stalks the good tempo and can return in winning form. AGAINST THE LAW (2) resumes. Back in grade and trip after he came to the end of his prep with a poor last over 1200m at Rosehill in Midway BM72 grade last September. Fitted with the two trials and likes the rain affected going. ARE EE QUE (7) fourth-up for this and due for a change of luck with the good tempo. Kept fresh again after battling to the line when sixth over 1000m at Wyong. Quickly running out of chances but gets her favoured conditions today. THE EXTREME CAT (1) resumes. Comes back a level for this and has a good record at this track and trip. Two trials had merit and well drawn with the claim. Value contender.
